rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Requiring Return Of Estate Property Pursuant To Probate Code 850
rulings.Rulings: Following a review of the Joint Case Management Statement filed on 2/21/2025, the Court continues all underlying petitions (in PES-23-305690 and PTR-22-305818) to 4/2/2025 in anticipation of a petition for approval of the settlement and other related petition(s).

rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Evidentiary Hearing On 850 Petition (Ownership Of Bank Accounts/Car/Rental Value)
rulings.Rulings: Following a review of the Joint Case Management Statement filed on 2/21/2025, the Court takes the evidentiary hearing off calendar. The Court instructs the parties to file the appropriate petition(s) seeking approval of the settlement agreement (LRSF 14.43.D) and the change of IAEA authority. Prob. Code sec. 10450.
